metadata.description: Canonical registry of ADF capabilities — skills, tools, agents, and plugins

plugins.name: adf-skills
plugins.description: ADF workflow skills — project scaffolding (adf-init), stage management (adf-stage), and structured reviews (adf-review) for the Agentic Development Framework

plugins.name: project-health
plugins.description: Code-level health auditing — tests, deps, hygiene, secrets, design drift, doc sync, and doc freshness. Complements ADF governance and review skills.

plugins.name: multi-model
plugins.description: Multi-model delegation and review — hand off implementation to Codex CLI, run external reviews across models (Codex, Claude -p, Gemini). Uses existing subscriptions at zero marginal cost.

plugins.name: discovery-tools
plugins.description: Research and product challenge skills — parallel research swarm for investigating topics from multiple angles, and office-hours for structured product challenge sessions that pressure-test concepts and find blind spots.

plugins.name: diagrams
plugins.description: Diagram routing skill — quick schematics via Excalidraw Architect (free, editable) or polished visuals via Diagram Forge (AI image generation). Routes to the right tool based on intent.
